title: DP's Chaoscraft
description: Ores have a chance to explode when mined.
body:
Ores have a chance to explode when mined, or blown up (And when stepped on in the case of redstone ores).

 

This mod should work with any mod's ore blocks, as long as they:

-Use the vanilla ore block class to register their blocks

-Are in the exploding_ores block tag

 

All ore exploding can be turned off with a simple gamerule.

 

This mod is open to any additions, if you have an idea that you think would fit the theme, feel free to recommend it.
